/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/example_app.dir/examples/main.cpp.o -o example_app -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libimgui.a libimplot.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libzmq.dylib libimgui.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL
